recap:
- The course is designed to run specifically on Serverless compute, with version 4 being the tested configuration.
- Classic compute may work, but serverless is recommended for optimal performance.
- Several Python libraries are pre-installed as part of the workspace setup; refer to the documentation for details.
- The `databricks-langchain` library is the updated version replacing `langchain-databricks`.
- The Airbnb dataset is stored as a Delta table in Unity Catalog and can be queried using Spark.
- Students should run the provided code to inspect the first few rows of the Airbnb dataset.
